description: MCP server for Kalshi prediction markets: native RSA-PSS auth, rate limiting, demo/prod safety.
name: io.github.cejor6/kalshi-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: Kalshi API key ID from https://kalshi.com/account/profile
environmentVariables.name: KALSHI_API_KEY_ID

environmentVariables.description: Inline PEM contents, for hosted deploys without filesystem access.
environmentVariables.name: KALSHI_PRIVATE_KEY_PEM

environmentVariables.description: demo or prod. Defaults to demo for safety.
environmentVariables.name: KALSHI_ENV

environmentVariables.description: Must be 1 for the server to start with KALSHI_ENV=prod. Defaults to 0.
environmentVariables.name: KALSHI_ALLOW_PROD

environmentVariables.description: Must be 1 for order-placement tools to operate. Read-only by default (0).
environmentVariables.name: KALSHI_TRADING_ENABLED

title: Kalshi Prediction Markets
